title: Mday
compiled_truth: Mday is an external contact at [Gmssr](companies/gmssr). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-18), Mday sent 146 and received 998 emails, totalling 1144 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (84), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (42), [Smara](people/smara) (33), [Sgovenar](people/sgovenar-govadv) (28), [Paulamirault](people/paulamirault-aec) (19).
timeline:
